title: Police Officers Leave Bag of Weapons on Street
summary: In London, five police officers were taken off their regular jobs because they left a bag full of weapons on a street. A person walking by found the bag and called the police. Inside, there were guns, a Taser, and bullets. The police came quickly and took the bag away safely. They are now checking what happened to make sure it doesn't happen again. The bag was found near the home of London's mayor, Sadiq Khan, but it's not clear why it was there. This incident is serious because weapons should always be kept safe by the police.

keywords.explanation: people who work to keep us safe and enforce laws
things like guns and Tasers that can be used to hurt people
a road where cars and people walk
the mayor who helps run London
a device that can stop someone without using bullets

questions.question: How many police officers were taken off duty?
Who found the bag of weapons?
Why are the police reviewing the incident?
options: To make sure it doesn't happen again
questions.correct_answer: To make sure it doesn't happen again

background_read: In London, police officers have important jobs to protect people and keep weapons safe. Sometimes, mistakes happen, and things like bags can be left behind. When weapons are not stored properly, it can be dangerous because someone might find them and get hurt. The police are supposed to always be careful with their equipment. This story shows why it's important for everyone, including police, to follow safety rules to prevent accidents and keep communities safe.
Article_Structure: WHO: Five Metropolitan Police officers and a member of the public
WHAT: A bag with weapons was left on a street and found by someone
WHERE: On a street in London, near Mayor Sadiq Khan's home
WHY: To check what happened and ensure it doesn't occur again

perspectives.description: The incident raises worries about police handling weapons and public safety.
